entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental change estimated to reduce crop yields in Sub-Saharan West Africa

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of crops measured as a result of climatic and management factors

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The broad geographical region where the study is focused

entities.name: ADAPTATION MEASURES
entities.description: Strategies used to mitigate the negative effects of climate change on crop yields

entities.name: AQUACROP
entities.description: A process-based model developed by the FAO to quantify climate change risks on crops

entities.name: NIGER BASIN
entities.description: The specific river basin in West Africa where the crops were analyzed

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A key cereal crop analyzed for climate change impact in the Niger Basin

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A key cereal crop analyzed for climate change impact in the Niger Basin

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A key cereal crop analyzed for climate change impact in the Niger Basin

entities.name: RAIN FED CULTIVATION
entities.description: Agricultural systems relying on rainfall for water supply

entities.name: SOWING DATES
entities.description: An adaptation strategy involving the timing of planting seeds

entities.name: CULTIVAR
entities.description: An adaptation strategy involving the selection of specific crop varieties

entities.name: RCP4.5
entities.description: A representative concentration pathway emissions scenario used for climate projection

entities.name: RCP8.5
entities.description: A representative concentration pathway emissions scenario used for climate projection

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: A climatic factor that had a larger effect on crop yields than precipitation

entities.name: PRECIPITATION
entities.description: A climatic factor that can influence crop yields

entities.name: SOUTHERN GUINEA SAVANNA ZONE
entities.description: An agro-ecological zone where maize and sorghum yields are projected to increase

entities.name: NORTHERN GUINEA SAVANNA ZONE
entities.description: An agro-ecological zone where maize and sorghum yields are projected to decrease

entities.name: SAHELIAN ZONE
entities.description: An agro-ecological zone where millet yield is projected to have little to no impact

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: A management factor that can significantly reverse negative yield changes
